name: Get Together Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Fill a saucepan with water and add the rice. Bring the water to a boil and let the rice boil freely for 9 minutes or until it is cooked through. Drain.
2. Stir in the 2 tablespoons of corn oil while the rice is cooking.
3. Wash and cut all of the vegetables and ham into very small diced pieces.
4. Mix the soy sauce and sugar together in a bowl.
5. Heat a wok or frying pan with the peanut oil until it is smoking.
6. Add the onions and stir fry for 1 minute.
7. Add the scallions and continue to fry for another 30 seconds.
8. Add the ham, snow peas, sprouts, and rice to the pan and stir fry for 3 minutes.
9. Push the ingredients aside, making a hole in the center.
10. Crack the egg into the hole and beat to mix the yellow and white. Stir into the other ingredients.
11. Make another hole and add the soy sauce mixture.
12. Toss all of the ingredients together and continue to fry for an additional 3-4 minutes.
13. Taste for seasoning. Add salt if necessary.
Serves 2.
